bedrock_agent_config.description: Intelligent customer service chatbot with escalation capabilities
bedrock_agent_config.instruction: You are a helpful customer service agent. Handle customer inquiries, check order status, process returns, and escalate complex issues to human agents when necessary. Always be polite and professional.

action_groups.name: customer_inquiry_actions
action_groups.description: Handle customer inquiries, orders, and returns

post.description: Get order status by order ID

action_groups.name: escalation_actions
action_groups.description: Escalate complex issues to human agents

post.description: Create support ticket for human agent

lambda_functions.code:
import json
import boto3
from datetime import datetime

sns = boto3.client('sns')
dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')

def lambda_handler(event, context):
    action = event.get('apiPath')
    
    if action == '/create-ticket':
        body = json.loads(event.get('requestBody', {}).get('content', {}).get('application/json', '{}'))
        ticket_id = f"TICKET-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}"
        
        table = dynamodb.Table('SupportTickets')
        table.put_item(Item={'ticketId': ticket_id, **body, 'createdAt': datetime.now().isoformat()})
        
        sns.publish(TopicArn=context.get('SNS_TOPIC_ARN'), Message=f"New ticket: {ticket_id}")
        
        return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps({'ticketId': ticket_id, 'status': 'escalated'})}
    
    return {'statusCode': 400, 'body': 'Invalid action'}

import json
import boto3

bedrock_agent_runtime = boto3.client('bedrock-agent-runtime')

def lambda_handler(event, context):
    body = json.loads(event.get('body', '{}'))
    user_input = body.get('message', '')
    session_id = body.get('sessionId', 'default-session')
    
    response = bedrock_agent_runtime.invoke_agent(
        agentId='AGENT_ID',
        agentAliasId='AGENT_ALIAS_ID',
        sessionId=session_id,
        inputText=user_input
    )
    
    return {
        'statusCode': 200,
        'headers': {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        'body': json.dumps({'response': response})
    }

main_template.Description: Serverless Customer Service Chatbot with Bedrock

Properties.Name: CustomerServiceChatbotAPI
Properties.Description: API Gateway for customer service chatbot

deployment_scripts.deploy.sh:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo 'Deploying Customer Service Chatbot...'

# Package Lambda functions
cd lambda/customer-inquiry && zip -r ../../inquiry.zip .
cd ../escalation && zip -r ../../escalation.zip .
cd ../api-gateway && zip -r ../../api.zip .
cd ../..

# Deploy CloudFormation stack
aws cloudformation deploy \
  --template-file cloudformation/main.yaml \
  --stack-name customer-service-chatbot \
  --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM

# Upload Lambda code
aws lambda update-function-code --function-name customer-inquiry-handler --zip-file fileb://inquiry.zip
aws lambda update-function-code --function-name escalation-handler --zip-file fileb://escalation.zip
aws lambda update-function-code --function-name api-gateway-handler --zip-file fileb://api.zip

echo 'Deployment complete!'
deployment_scripts.setup.py:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import boto3
import json

def setup_bedrock_agent():
    bedrock = boto3.client('bedrock-agent')
    
    # Create Bedrock Agent
    agent_response = bedrock.create_agent(
        agentName='CustomerServiceEscalationBot',
        foundationModel='anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0',
        instruction='You are a helpful customer service agent...',
        agentResourceRoleArn='arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT:role/BedrockAgentRole'
    )
    
    agent_id = agent_response['agent']['agentId']
    print(f'Agent created: {agent_id}')
    
    # Create action groups
    bedrock.create_agent_action_group(
        agentId=agent_id,
        actionGroupName='customer_inquiry_actions',
        actionGroupExecutor={'lambda': 'arn:aws:lambda:REGION:ACCOUNT:function:customer-inquiry-handler'},
        apiSchema={'payload': json.dumps({'openapi': '3.0.0'})}
    )
    
    print('Setup complete!')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    setup_bedrock_agent()

# Test API Gateway endpoint
curl -X POST https://API_ID.execute-api.REGION.amazonaws.com/prod/chat \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"message": "What is the status of order 12345?", "sessionId": "test-session"}'

echo '\nTest complete!'
